title: Create a startup in prediction markets
description: Prediction markets are having a moment. Where is the wedge for a small team?

title: Trading terminal + permissionless bet creation
description: Axiom-style terminal for power traders, with pump.fun-style market creation for anyone.

title: Telegram bot for simple bets
description: Lightweight P2P bets between friends, settled in-chat.
decline_reason: Easy distribution but weak retention; bots get commoditized and cloned fast.

title: White-label the bot for crypto communities
description: Explored before the parent was dropped — stays visible, greyed, as part of the record.

title: B2B prediction-market infra API
description: Sell odds feeds, settlement and liquidity routing to apps that want embedded markets.

title: MVP: terminal on top of existing venues
description: Aggregate Polymarket/Kalshi liquidity first; own the trader UX before owning the venue.

title: Build our own orderbook from day one
decline_reason: Liquidity bootstrap risk too high before we have order flow.
